feedback.text: Greetings. With regards to the current state of consumer rights in others jurisdictions outside the EU, I do feel greatly thankful I live where I do. Although, this doesn't stop that from changing in the future. I have become familiar with the practices of video game companies and their tendency to drop the selling and maintenance of old games. I believe more action is required to stop the loss of access to purchased products after their owners' decide that their not worth preserving anymore.
